meta.title: FreshMilk | A team breaking lines, finding possibility in the market
meta.description: Fusing technology and content trends to bring delight to people. Storit, tolli, Picktory, econoup — four experiments from a Pohang-based content studio.

hero.title:
Break the line.
Let the market define us.
hero.subtitle: Fusing technology and content trends to bring delight to people. Every day, we ask the market for an answer.
hero.expFootnote: * working title — even the name is decided by the market.

about.heading:
Where technology meets content,
we drop new hypotheses every day.
about.missionText: Fuse the trends of technology and content to bring delight to people.
about.visionText: The content platform you visit every day.
about.storyP1: Founded in December 2025 at the Handong University business incubator. We are walking, step by step, toward the content platform people visit every day.
about.storyP2: Running four experiments in parallel — listening to the market, applying fast, learning faster.

how.heading: This is how we work.
how.subheading: Three values. Six principles. The operating system for every experiment.
how.value1Title: Erase the lines. Pursue boundless creativity.
how.value1Text: We refuse to be trapped by old frames. Every idea is respected. We challenge what looks impossible — first.
how.value2Title: We don't set our own limits. The market decides.
how.value2Text: We don't pre-judge our value. Every idea ships as an experiment first, then evolves from the result.
how.value3Title: Speed — ship · validate · fail · pivot → win fast.
how.value3Text: Speed is the amount of learning. We trust ship counts over perfection and data over confidence.
how.p1Text: We ask "how could it work?" first. Every proposal is logged and revisited regularly.
how.p2Text: Ship an MVP fast. Discard private convictions that the market hasn't validated.
how.p3Text: A shipped iteration beats a perfect plan. Experiment small, share results.
how.p4Text: We own what we ship. Problems surface immediately, and we solve them together.
how.p5Text: Feedback is for improvement, never blame. Failure becomes the next asset.
how.p6Text: Default to sharing. The why and how of decisions are visible to all.

projects.heading: Four experiments, one mission.
projects.subheading: Parallel attempts toward the content platform people visit every day. All in design + app development.
projects.mainTagline: Storit · Webtoon quiz reward fandom community
projects.mainCopy: From reading webtoons to playing them. A community where you solve quizzes, earn rewards, and meet people who love the same stories.
projects.p2Copy: A daily verse, at your fingertips. A game-like service for memorizing the Bible.
projects.p3Copy: K-content, watched by guessing. A platform where prediction and reasoning bring fans together.
projects.p4Copy: Economics, five minutes a day — Duolingo style. A habit-forming way to learn money.
projects.disclaimer: * working title — even the name is decided by the market.

lab.subtitle: Experiments, retrospectives, failures, and pivots. A record of what we are learning — soon to be public.

contact.heading: We're looking for people to experiment with us.
contact.subtitle: Partnerships, product collabs, and general inquiries are all welcome. Email is the fastest route.
